firstTimeRenting.title: First Time Renting? Here's Your Complete Guide
firstTimeRenting.description: Everything you need to know about finding, viewing, and securing your first rental property.

avoidScams.title: How to Avoid Rental Scams: Red Flags to Watch For
avoidScams.description: Learn to identify common rental scams and protect yourself from fraud when searching for a new home.

rentalAgreement.title: Understanding Your Rental Agreement: Key Terms Explained
rentalAgreement.description: Break down complex legal terms and understand what you're signing before committing to a rental.

propertyInspection.title: Property Inspection Checklist: What to Look For
propertyInspection.description: A comprehensive guide to inspecting potential rental properties and identifying potential issues.

tips.subtitle: Practical guides from local tenants, legal experts, and the Homiio editorial team.

scheduleViewing.question: How do I schedule a property viewing?
scheduleViewing.answer: You can schedule a viewing by clicking the "Schedule Viewing" button on any property listing. Our system will connect you with the landlord or property manager to arrange a convenient time.

verifiedProperty.question: What does "Verified Property" mean?
verifiedProperty.answer: Verified properties have been personally inspected by our team to ensure they meet our quality standards. This includes checking the property condition, amenities, and verifying the landlord's credentials.

reportSuspicious.question: How do I report a suspicious listing?
reportSuspicious.answer: If you encounter a suspicious listing, click the "Report" button on the property page. Our safety team will investigate and take appropriate action to protect our community.

applicationRequirements.question: What are the rental application requirements?
applicationRequirements.answer: Requirements vary by property, but typically include proof of income, rental history, credit check, and references. Each listing will specify the exact requirements needed.

hostCta.subtitle: Reach verified renters across Spain — free to list, fair fees, real human support.
hostCta.title: List your space, find a great tenant

page.heroSubtitle: Creating a world of ethical housing, healthcare, and mobility
page.aboutBody1: Horizon is a global initiative designed to make housing more accessible, affordable, and ethical for everyone. By joining a network of properties across 120+ cities worldwide, members gain access to fair housing, healthcare benefits, and travel support.
page.aboutBody2: Our mission is to create sustainable living environments that foster community and wellbeing while reducing the environmental impact of housing.

apply.title: Apply for Membership
apply.description: Complete your profile and submit a membership application with your housing needs and preferences.

verify.title: Get Verified
verify.description: Our team reviews your application and verifies your identity and background information.

access.title: Access the Network
access.description: Once approved, browse and book properties across our global network with priority access.

page.joinSubtitle: Apply today and take the first step toward ethical, accessible housing worldwide.
page.story1: Horizon made my relocation so much easier. I found an ethical apartment in Berlin within a week and the healthcare coverage saved me when I needed emergency care.
page.story2: As a digital nomad, having access to quality housing in multiple cities has been life-changing. The community aspect is what makes Horizon truly special.

sindi.name: Sindi
sindi.title: Sindi
sindi.subtitle: Housing Justice Advocate with Real-Time Info

panel.title: Sindi
panel.subtitle: AI housing assistant
panel.intro: Your AI housing assistant. Ask about tenant rights, leases, and housing issues — right here, without leaving the page.
panel.empty: Start a new conversation to get help.

auth.message: Please sign in to access Sindi, your AI-powered housing justice advocate

welcome.title: Welcome to Sindi
welcome.subtitle: Your AI-powered housing justice advocate with real-time information access. I'm here to fight for your tenant rights, challenge unfair practices, and provide current legal updates. Together, we can build a more equitable housing system.

rentGouging.title: Rent Gouging Check
rentGouging.prompt: My rent increased by [amount]%. Is this legal rent gouging? What can I do to fight unfair increases?

evictionDefense.title: Illegal Eviction Defense
evictionDefense.prompt: I received an eviction notice that seems illegal. Help me understand my rights and how to fight back.

securityDeposit.title: Security Deposit Theft
securityDeposit.prompt: My landlord is keeping my security deposit without valid reasons. How do I recover my money?

unsafeLiving.title: Unsafe Living Conditions
unsafeLiving.prompt: My apartment has serious safety issues. What are my rights and how do I force repairs?

discrimination.title: Discrimination Help
discrimination.prompt: I think I'm being discriminated against by my landlord. What are my rights and how do I report this?

retaliation.title: Retaliation Protection
retaliation.prompt: My landlord is retaliating because I complained. What protections do I have?

leaseReview.title: Lease Review
leaseReview.prompt: Can you review my lease for unfair clauses and illegal terms I should challenge?

tenantOrganizing.title: Tenant Organizing
tenantOrganizing.prompt: How can I organize with other tenants to fight for better conditions and fair treatment?

currentLaws.title: Current Laws & Updates
currentLaws.prompt: What are the current tenant rights laws and recent legal developments I should know about?

catalunya.title: Catalunya Tenant Rights
catalunya.prompt: I'm in Catalunya/Barcelona. What are my tenant rights and how can I connect with local tenant organizations like Sindicat de Llogateres?

housing.title: Find Ethical Housing
housing.subtitle: I can search for properties with advanced filters. Try these examples:

cheap.title: Cheap Apartments
cheap.prompt: Find me cheap apartments under $1000 in Barcelona

petFriendly.title: Pet-Friendly Homes
petFriendly.prompt: Show me pet-friendly apartments with parking under $1500

furnished.title: Furnished Studios
furnished.prompt: I need furnished studios with wifi under $1200

luxury.title: Luxury Properties
luxury.prompt: Show me luxury apartments with gym and pool over $3000

shared.title: Shared Housing
shared.prompt: Find shared rooms or coliving spaces under $800

housing.naturalLanguage: 💡 I understand natural language! Try: "cheap 2-bedroom apartments in Barcelona with parking" or "luxury studios with gym under $2000"

features.title: How I fight for housing justice:
features.rentIncreases: • Challenge illegal rent increases and gouging
features.deposits: • Fight security deposit theft and fraud
features.updates: • Provide current legal updates and recent developments
features.organizations: • Connect you with local tenant organizations

chat.placeholder: Ask Sindi about your tenant rights...

mission.title: Why Support Homiio?
mission.description: We're building more than just a rental platform—we're creating a complete ecosystem for ethical housing. Your support helps us:
goals: Fight against rental abuse and hidden fees
Create transparent processes for tenants and landlords
Integrate innovative payment methods like FairCoin
Provide legal support through our Sindi integration

calendar.blockBodySingle: Choose how long these dates are unavailable.

reservations.emptyDescription: Guest requests will appear here once someone books.

list.signInTitle: Sign in to see your stays
list.emptyAllDescription: Once you book a place it will show up here.
list.emptyFilteredDescription: Try a different filter or explore new stays.

toast.pickDates: Pick check-in and check-out dates first

detail.title: Address
detail.emptyPropertiesDescription: Listings at this address will appear here.
detail.emptyReviewsDescription: Be the first to share your experience at this address.
detail.notFoundDescription: We couldn't find any details for this address.

location.title: Location
location.instructions:
📍 Address Details: Fill in the complete address information. Our system uses a hierarchical structure:
• STREET level: Street name only
• BUILDING level: Street + number + building details
• UNIT level: Building + floor + unit/apartment details
Reviews and listings are organized by these levels for better organization.
location.floorPrivacyHint: ℹ️ Will be shown as approximate for privacy

amenities.title: Amenities
amenities.subtitle: Select the amenities available at this property.

mode.hint: Switch between long-term rentals and vacation stays
mode.label: Rental mode

publicHousing.openFailed: Could not open the housing website

auth.required: Please sign in to call the owner

contact.noPhone: No phone number available for this listing

source.openFailed: Could not open the source website

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.message: An unexpected issue interrupted what you were doing. You can try again, or send us a quick report so we can investigate.
boundary.maxRetriesMessage: You've reached the retry limit. Please report the issue so we can take a look.
boundary.reportCopiedMessage: The error report has been copied to your clipboard.
boundary.reportFailedMessage: We couldn't copy the report to your clipboard. Please try again.

android.title: Android Settings
android.description: You can manage notification channels and advanced settings in your device's Settings app under Apps > Homiio > Notifications.

ios.title: iOS Settings
ios.description: For more granular control, you can also manage notification settings in your device's Settings app under Notifications > Homiio.

test.title: Test Notifications
test.description: Send test notifications to verify your settings are working correctly.

property.title: Property Notifications
property.description: New properties, price changes, and viewing reminders

message.title: Message Notifications
message.description: New messages from agents, landlords, and other users

contract.title: Contract Notifications
contract.description: Contract updates, signatures, and important deadlines

reminder.title: Reminder Notifications
reminder.description: Viewing reminders, application deadlines, and follow-ups

system.title: System Notifications
system.description: App updates, maintenance, and important announcements

marketing.title: Marketing Notifications
marketing.description: Promotional offers, newsletters, and special deals

badge.title: Badge Count
badge.description: Show unread count on app icon

push.title: Push Notifications
push.description: Receive notifications even when app is closed

empty.title: No notifications
empty.message: You're all caught up! New notifications will appear here.
empty.filtered: No notifications match your current filter

markAllRead.error: Failed to mark all as read

enabled.description: You will receive notifications for enabled categories.

disabled.title: Notifications Disabled

permissions.title: Enable Notifications

welcome.title: Welcome to Homiio! 👋
welcome.body: Thanks for trying out our app. Start exploring now!

delete.title: Delete Notification
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this notification?

clearAll.title: Clear All Notifications
clearAll.message: This will clear all notifications and reset the badge count. This action cannot be undone.

evictions.title: Eviction watch
evictions.subtitle: Show up for your neighbours. Track upcoming evictions and stand together to stop them.

empty.title: No evictions here yet
empty.subtitle: When neighbours report an upcoming eviction, it shows up here so the community can organise.

detail.title: Eviction
detail.approximateNotice: The exact address is hidden — this pin is approximate to protect the household.
detail.noContact: No contact details were shared for this case.
detail.contactLockedNotice: Confirm your attendance to see the meeting point and the organiser's contact details.

cancel.confirmMessage: It will be marked as cancelled and attendees will be notified.

comments.empty: No comments yet. Start the conversation.

report.title: Report this case
report.intro: Flag a case that looks fake, abusive or inappropriate. Our team reviews every report.

form.title: Post an eviction
form.subtitle: Give neighbours what they need to show up and help.
form.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Eviction at Carrer de Sants 20
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What's going on, and what kind of support is needed?
form.mapHint: Tap the map to drop a pin and auto-fill the area.
form.approximateHint: Rounds the pin so the exact home is never pinpointed.
form.locationRequired: Drop a pin on the map
form.dateRequired: Add a valid date and time
